cover.subtitle:
주먹도끼와 빗살무늬 토기,
한반도 최초의 흔적.
cover.imagePrompt: Prehistoric Korea illustration. ONE early human figure in roughly stitched leather wrapping, kneeling beside a riverbank with a hand axe (jumeokdokki) and a comb-pattern pottery jar (bitsalmunui togi) half-buried in sand. Background: simple cave silhouette and pine forest. Composition: quiet discovery. Color: clay-brown + ochre + bronze. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 유물 사진과 유적지를 짝지어 묻는 문항이 많다. 주먹도끼-연천 전곡리, 빗살무늬 토기-서울 암사동, 패총-부산 동삼동을 묶어서 외울 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized hand axe (jumeokdokki) icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small comb-patterned jar silhouette. Cream #F2EDE3 base + clay-brown #B58A5E accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
